creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2006-11-08 20:23:34 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/py-cyruslib     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  cyruslib is wrapped interface for imaplib.py, it adds support for
  cyrus specific commands. Function naming is the same of cyradm
  
  WWW: http://oss.netfarm.it/python-cyrus.php
  
  PR:             ports/105043
  Submitted by:   Dmitriy Kirhlarov <dimma@higis.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.805     +1 -0      ports/mail/Makefile
  1.1       +36 -0     ports/mail/py-cyruslib/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/mail/py-cyruslib/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/mail/py-cyruslib/pkg-descr (new)
